
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>HAM QUEST — Amateur Radio RPG</title>
<style>
  @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Share+Tech+Mono&family=VT323&display=swap');

  :root {
    --green: #00ff41;
    --dim-green: #00aa2a;
    --dark-green: #003a0f;
    --bg: #020f04;
    --amber: #ffb000;
    --red: #ff3131;
    --cyan: #00ffff;
    --white: #ccffcc;
  }

  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

  body {
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--green);
    font-family: 'Share Tech Mono', monospace;
    height: 100dvh;
    overflow: hidden;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
  }

  /* CRT scanline effect — disabled on mobile for performance */
  @media (min-width: 600px) {
    body::before {
      content: '';
      position: fixed;
      inset: 0;
      background: repeating-linear-gradient(
        0deg,
        transparent,
        transparent 2px,
        rgba(0,0,0,0.12) 2px,
        rgba(0,0,0,0.12) 4px
      );
      pointer-events: none;
      z-index: 100;
    }
    body::after {
      content: '';
      position: fixed;
      inset: 0;
      background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, transparent 60%, rgba(0,0,0,0.7) 100%);
      pointer-events: none;
      z-index: 101;
    }
  }

  #terminal {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100dvh;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 0;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    overflow: hidden;
    position: relative;
  }

  @media (min-width: 700px) {
    #terminal {
      width: min(900px, 98vw);
      height: min(680px, 96vh);
      border: 2px solid var(--dim-green);
      border-radius: 4px;
      box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0,255,65,0.3), 0 0 60px rgba(0,255,65,0.1);
    }
  }

  /* ── HEADER ────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  #header {
    background: var(--dark-green);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--dim-green);
    padding: 5px 10px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
    font-size: 1rem;
    color: var(--dim-green);
    flex-shrink: 0;
    gap: 6px;
  }

  #header .title { color: var(--green); font-size: 1.2rem; letter-spacing: 3px; }
  #header .blink { animation: blink 1s step-end infinite; color: var(--amber); }
  @keyframes blink { 50% { opacity: 0; } }

  /* ── STATS BAR (mobile top strip) ─────────────────────── */
  #stats-bar {
    display: flex;
    background: var(--dark-green);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--dim-green);
    padding: 4px 8px;
    gap: 10px;
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    align-items: center;
  }

  .sb-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; white-space: nowrap; }
  .sb-label { color: var(--dim-green); font-size: 0.65rem; }
  .sb-val { color: var(--amber); font-family: 'VT323', monospace; font-size: 1rem; }
  .sb-val.hi { color: var(--green); }
  .sb-val.lo { color: var(--red); }

  .sb-bar-wrap { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 3px; }
  .sb-bar-bg { width: 36px; height: 5px; background: var(--bg); border-radius: 2px; }
  .sb-bar-fill { height: 100%; border-radius: 2px; transition: width 0.4s; background: var(--green); }
  .sb-bar-fill.amber { background: var(--amber); }
  .sb-bar-fill.red { background: var(--red); }

  /* ── MAIN LAYOUT ────────────────────────────────────────── */
  #main {
    display: flex;
    flex: 1;
    overflow: hidden;
    flex-direction: column;
  }

  @media (min-width: 700px) {
    #main { flex-direction: row; }
  }

  /* ── SIDEBAR (desktop) ──────────────────────────────────── */
  #sidebar {
    display: none;
  }

  @media (min-width: 700px) {
    #sidebar {
      display: flex;
      width: 190px;
      border-right: 1px solid var(--dark-green);
      padding: 8px 6px;
      font-size: 0.70rem;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 8px;
      flex-shrink: 0;
      overflow-y: auto;
    }
  }

  .stat-box {
    border: 1px solid var(--dark-green);
    padding: 5px 7px;
  }
  .stat-box h3 {
    font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
    font-size: 0.95rem;
    color: var(--dim-green);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--dark-green);
    margin-bottom: 3px;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
  }
  .stat-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin: 2px 0; }
  .stat-val { color: var(--amber); }
  .stat-val.hi { color: var(--green); }
  .stat-val.lo { color: var(--red); }
  .bar-container { height: 5px; background: var(--dark-green); margin: 2px 0 3px; border-radius: 1px; }
  .bar { height: 100%; background: var(--green); transition: width 0.4s; border-radius: 1px; }
  .bar.amber { background: var(--amber); }
  .bar.red { background: var(--red); }

  /* ── CONTENT ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  #content {
    flex: 1;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  #output {
    flex: 1;
    overflow-y: auto;
    padding: 8px 10px;
    font-size: 0.88rem;
    line-height: 1.65;
    -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
  }

  @media (min-width: 700px) {
    #output { font-size: 0.82rem; padding: 12px 14px; }
  }

  #output::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 4px; }
  #output::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: var(--bg); }
  #output::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--dark-green); }

  .msg { margin: 2px 0; }
  .msg.system { color: var(--dim-green); }
  .msg.action { color: var(--cyan); }
  .msg.success { color: var(--green); }
  .msg.danger { color: var(--red); }
  .msg.amber { color: var(--amber); }
  .msg.white { color: var(--white); }
  .msg.header {
    font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
    font-size: 1.15rem;
    color: var(--green);
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    margin-top: 6px;
  }
  .msg.divider { color: var(--dark-green); }
  .msg.choice {
    color: var(--green);
    cursor: pointer;
    padding: 3px 0;
    display: block;
    -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
  }
  .msg.choice:hover,
  .msg.choice:active { color: var(--bg); background: var(--green); padding-left: 4px; }
  .msg.prompt { color: var(--amber); }

  /* Larger touch targets for choice items on mobile */
  @media (max-width: 699px) {
    .msg.choice {
      padding: 6px 2px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--dark-green);
      font-size: 0.95rem;
    }
  }

  /* ── INPUT AREA ──────────────────────────────────────────── */
  #log-display {
    font-size: 0.62rem;
    color: var(--dark-green);
    border-top: 1px solid var(--dark-green);
    padding: 2px 10px;
    font-style: italic;
    white-space: nowrap;
    overflow: hidden;
    text-overflow: ellipsis;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  #input-area {
    border-top: 1px solid var(--dim-green);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 6px 8px;
    gap: 6px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    background: var(--dark-green);
  }

  #prompt-label {
    color: var(--dim-green);
    white-space: nowrap;
    font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  #input {
    flex: 1;
    background: transparent;
    border: none;
    outline: none;
    color: var(--green);
    font-family: 'Share Tech Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 1rem;
    caret-color: var(--green);
    min-width: 0;
    /* prevent iOS zoom on focus */
    font-size: max(16px, 0.9rem);
  }

  @media (min-width: 700px) {
    #input { font-size: 0.85rem; }
  }

  #send-btn {
    background: var(--green);
    color: #000;
    border: none;
    padding: 6px 14px;
    font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
    font-size: 1.2rem;
    cursor: pointer;
    border-radius: 2px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    touch-action: manipulation;
    -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
    min-width: 56px;
    min-height: 36px;
  }

  #send-btn:active { background: var(--dim-green); }

  /* ── NUMBER PAD (mobile quick input) ─────────────────────── */
  #numpad {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr);
    gap: 4px;
    padding: 4px 8px 6px;
    background: var(--dark-green);
    border-top: 1px solid var(--dim-green);
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  @media (min-width: 700px) { #numpad { display: none; } }

  .np-btn {
    background: var(--bg);
    border: 1px solid var(--dim-green);
    color: var(--green);
    font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
    font-size: 1.3rem;
    padding: 7px 4px;
    cursor: pointer;
    border-radius: 2px;
    text-align: center;
    touch-action: manipulation;
    -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
    min-height: 42px;
  }

  .np-btn:active { background: var(--dim-green); color: var(--bg); }
  .np-btn.wide { grid-column: span 2; }
  .np-btn.accent { border-color: var(--amber); color: var(--amber); }
  .np-btn.accent:active { background: var(--amber); color: var(--bg); }

  /* ── SIGNAL METER ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  #signal-meter {
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-end;
    gap: 2px;
    height: 14px;
  }
  .sig-bar { width: 4px; background: var(--dark-green); border-radius: 1px; }
  .sig-bar.active { background: var(--green); }
  .sig-bar.active.amber { background: var(--amber); }
  .sig-bar.active.red { background: var(--red); }

  /* ── STATS TOGGLE BUTTON (mobile) ──────────────────────── */
  #stats-toggle {
    display: inline-block;
    background: none;
    border: 1px solid var(--dim-green);
    color: var(--dim-green);
    font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    padding: 1px 6px;
    cursor: pointer;
    border-radius: 2px;
    touch-action: manipulation;
  }

  @media (min-width: 700px) { #stats-toggle { display: none; } }

  #stats-bar.collapsed .sb-item:not(.always-show) { display: none; }

  .typewriter { overflow: hidden; white-space: nowrap; }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div id="terminal">
  <!-- HEADER -->
  <div id="header">
    <span class="title">≋ HAM QUEST ≋</span>
    <span id="freq-display" style="font-size:0.9rem;">14.225</span>
    <span style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;">
      <span><span class="blink">●</span></span>
      <button id="stats-toggle" onclick="document.getElementById('stats-bar').classList.toggle('collapsed')">STATS</button>
    </span>
    <div id="signal-meter"></div>
  </div>

  <!-- MOBILE STATS BAR -->
  <div id="stats-bar">
    <div class="sb-item always-show">
      <span class="sb-label">CALL</span>
      <span class="sb-val hi" id="callsign">—</span>
    </div>
    <div class="sb-item always-show">
      <span class="sb-label">LIC</span>
      <span class="sb-val" id="license-class">NOV</span>
    </div>
    <div class="sb-item always-show">
      <span class="sb-label">XP</span>
      <span class="sb-val" id="xp-val">0</span>
      <div class="sb-bar-bg"><div class="sb-bar-fill" id="xp-bar" style="width:0%"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="sb-item always-show">
      <span class="sb-label">BAT</span>
      <span class="sb-val hi" id="battery-val">100%</span>
      <div class="sb-bar-bg"><div class="sb-bar-fill amber" id="battery-bar" style="width:100%"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="sb-item always-show">
      <span class="sb-label">MOR</span>
      <span class="sb-val hi" id="morale-val">100%</span>
      <div class="sb-bar-bg"><div class="sb-bar-fill" id="morale-bar" style="width:100%"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="sb-item">
      <span class="sb-label">ANT</span>
      <span class="sb-val" id="antenna-val">1</span>
    </div>
    <div class="sb-item">
      <span class="sb-label">RIG</span>
      <span class="sb-val" id="radio-val">1</span>
    </div>
    <div class="sb-item">
      <span class="sb-label">QSO</span>
      <span class="sb-val" id="qso-count">0</span>
    </div>
    <div class="sb-item">
      <span class="sb-label">PROP</span>
      <span class="sb-val" id="prop-val">1</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div id="main">
    <!-- SIDEBAR (desktop only, hidden on mobile) -->
    <div id="sidebar">
      <div class="stat-box">
        <h3>OPERATOR</h3>
        <div class="stat-row"><span>Call Sign:</span><span class="stat-val hi" id="callsign-sb">—</span></div>
        <div class="stat-row"><span>License:</span><span class="stat-val" id="license-class-sb">Novice</span></div>
        <div class="stat-row"><span>XP:</span><span class="stat-val" id="xp-val-sb">0</span></div>
        <div class="bar-container"><div class="bar" id="xp-bar-sb" style="width:0%"></div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-box">
        <h3>VITALS</h3>
        <div class="stat-row"><span>Morale:</span><span class="stat-val hi" id="morale-val-sb">100%</span></div>
        <div class="bar-container"><div class="bar" id="morale-bar-sb" style="width:100%"></div></div>
        <div class="stat-row"><span>Battery:</span><span class="stat-val hi" id="battery-val-sb">100%</span></div>
        <div class="bar-container"><div class="bar amber" id="battery-bar-sb" style="width:100%"></div></div>
        <div class="stat-row"><span>Antenna:</span><span class="stat-val" id="antenna-val-sb">1</span></div>
        <div class="stat-row"><span>Radio:</span><span class="stat-val" id="radio-val-sb">1</span></div>
        <div class="stat-row"><span>Prop:</span><span class="stat-val" id="prop-val-sb">1</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-box">
        <h3>INVENTORY</h3>
        <div id="inventory-list" style="font-size:0.67rem; color:var(--dim-green);">Handheld radio<br>Dipole<br>Logbook</div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-box">
        <h3>QSO LOG</h3>
        <div id="qso-count-sb" style="text-align:center;font-family:'VT323',monospace;font-size:1.5rem;color:var(--amber);">0</div>
        <div style="text-align:center;font-size:0.62rem;color:var(--dim-green);">contacts made</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- MAIN CONTENT -->
    <div id="content">
      <div id="output"></div>
      <div id="log-display">SYSTEM READY — 73 DE HAM QUEST</div>
      <div id="input-area">
        <span id="prompt-label">de W?&gt;</span>
        <input type="text" id="input" placeholder="number or text..." autocomplete="off"
               autocorrect="off" autocapitalize="off" spellcheck="false"
               />
        <button id="send-btn" onclick="handleInput(document.getElementById('input').value); document.getElementById('input').value='';">SEND</button>
      </div>
      <!-- MOBILE NUMBER PAD -->
      <div id="numpad">
        <button class="np-btn" onclick="npPress('1')">1</button>
        <button class="np-btn" onclick="npPress('2')">2</button>
        <button class="np-btn" onclick="npPress('3')">3</button>
        <button class="np-btn" onclick="npPress('4')">4</button>
        <button class="np-btn" onclick="npPress('5')">5</button>
        <button class="np-btn" onclick="npPress('6')">6</button>
        <button class="np-btn" onclick="npPress('7')">7</button>
        <button class="np-btn" onclick="npPress('8')">8</button>
        <button class="np-btn" onclick="npPress('9')">9</button>
        <button class="np-btn" onclick="npPress('0')">0</button>
        <button class="np-btn accent wide" onclick="npSend()">▶ GO</button>
        <button class="np-btn" onclick="npBackspace()">⌫</button>
        <button class="np-btn accent wide" onclick="npClear()">CLR</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
// ============================================================
// HAM QUEST — Amateur Radio Text RPG
// ============================================================

const output = document.getElementById('output');
const input = document.getElementById('input');
const logDisplay = document.getElementById('log-display');

// Game State
const G = {
  callsign: '',
  license: 0, // 0=Novice, 1=Technician, 2=General, 3=Amateur Extra
  licenseNames: ['Novice', 'Technician', 'General', 'Amateur Extra'],
  xp: 0, xpNext: 100,
  morale: 100, battery: 100,
  cw: 5, antenna: 1, radio: 1, prop: 1,
  qsoCount: 0,
  inventory: ['Handheld radio', 'Dipole', 'Logbook'],
  location: 'shack',
  freq: 14.225,
  activeMode: 'SSB',
  activeAntenna: 'Dipole',
  ownedAntennas: ['Dipole'],
  inContest: false,
  contestScore: 0,
  phase: 'intro',
  choices: [],
  awaitingInput: false,
  inputMode: 'choice',
  inputCallback: null,
  heat: 0,
  greyItems: [],
  vintageItems: [],
  activeRig: null,
  rigBonus: 0,
  satQSOs: 0,
  activeStormVehicle: null,
  ownedStormVehicles: [],
  tornadoCount: 0,
  stormData: 0,
  stormLog: [],
  celebEncounters: [],
  stormAchievements: {},
  satLog: [],
  funCubeOwned: false,
  funCubePro: false,
  sdrItems: [],
  civItems: [],
  qsoLog: [],
  milLog: [],
  milSigsHeard: 0,
  satMonLog: [],
  scanLog: [],
  scanUnlocked: [],
};

function unlockFeatures() {
  if (G.license === 1) {
    if (!G.inventory.includes('VHF/UHF Radio')) G.inventory.push('VHF/UHF Radio');
    if (!G.ownedAntennas.includes('Discone')) { G.ownedAntennas.push('Discone'); G.inventory.push('Discone'); }
    print(`  New item: VHF/UHF Radio + Discone antenna unlocked!`, 'cyan', 600);
  }
  if (G.license === 2) {
    if (!G.inventory.includes('HF Transceiver')) G.inventory.push('HF Transceiver');
    if (!G.ownedAntennas.includes('Yagi-Uda')) { G.ownedAntennas.push('Yagi-Uda'); G.inventory.push('Yagi-Uda'); }
    print(`  New items: HF Transceiver & Yagi-Uda beam unlocked!`, 'cyan', 600);
  }
  if (G.license === 3) {
    if (!G.inventory.includes('Amplifier')) G.inventory.push('Amplifier');
    if (!G.ownedAntennas.includes('Phased Array')) { G.ownedAntennas.push('Phased Array'); G.inventory.push('Phased Array'); }
    print(`  New item: 1kW Amplifier + Phased Array antenna unlocked!`, 'cyan', 600);
  }
}



const LICENSES = ['Novice', 'Technician', 'General', 'Amateur Extra'];
const MODE_CATS = [
  'Voice', 'CW', 'Weak Signal', 'PSK/RTTY', 'SSTV',
  'Packet & Data', 'Robust Digital', 'Hell Modes', 'Television', 'Experimental'
];

// Signal meter animation
const sigMeter = document.getElementById('signal-meter');
function buildSignalMeter() {
  sigMeter.innerHTML = '';
  for (let i = 1; i <= 9; i++) {
    const bar = document.createElement('div');
    bar.className = 'sig-bar';
    bar.style.height = (4 + i * 2.5) + 'px';
    bar.id = 'sig' + i;
    sigMeter.appendChild(bar);
  }
}
buildSignalMeter();

function animateSignal(level) {
  for (let i = 1; i <= 9; i++) {
    const bar = document.getElementById('sig' + i);
    bar.className = 'sig-bar';
    if (i <= level) {
      if (i <= 3) bar.classList.add('active');
      else if (i <= 6) bar.classList.add('active', 'amber');
      else bar.classList.add('active', 'red');
    }
  }
}

setInterval(() => {
  const lvl = Math.floor(Math.random() * 5) + 3;
  animateSignal(lvl);
  document.getElementById('freq-display').textContent =
    (G.freq + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.001).toFixed(3) + ' MHz';
}, 800);

// ============================================================
// OUTPUT HELPERS
// ============================================================
let printQueue = [];
let printing = false;

function print(text, cls = 'system', delay = 0) {
  printQueue.push({ text, cls, delay });
  if (!printing) processPrintQueue();
}

function processPrintQueue() {
  if (printQueue.length === 0) { printing = false; return; }
  printing = true;
  const { text, cls, delay } = printQueue.shift();
  setTimeout(() => {
    const div = document.createElement('div');
    div.className = 'msg ' + cls;
    div.textContent = text;
    output.appendChild(div);
    output.scrollTop = output.scrollHeight;
    processPrintQueue();
  }, delay);
}

function printBlank() { print('', 'system'); }
function printDivider() { print('─'.repeat(58), 'divider'); }

function printChoices(choices) {
  G.choices = choices;
  G.awaitingInput = true;
  G.inputMode = 'choice';
  choices.forEach((c, i) => {
    print(`  [${i + 1}] ${c.label}`, 'choice');
  });
}

function getInput(prompt, callback) {
  G.awaitingInput = true;
  G.inputMode = 'text';
  G.inputCallback = callback;
  if (prompt) print(prompt, 'prompt');
  // On mobile, auto-focus the input so keyboard pops up
  setTimeout(function() {
    const inp = document.getElementById('input');
    if (inp) { inp.focus(); }
    updateStats(); // refresh inputmode on the element
  }, 50);
}

function updateStats() {
  document.getElementById('antenna-val').textContent = G.antenna;
  document.getElementById('radio-val').textContent = G.radio;
  document.getElementById('prop-val').textContent = G.prop;
  document.getElementById('xp-bar').style.width = Math.min(100, (G.xp / G.xpNext) * 100) + '%';
  const xpEl = document.getElementById('xp-val');
  if (xpEl) xpEl.textContent = G.xp;
  const csEl = document.getElementById('callsign');
  if (csEl) csEl.textContent = G.callsign || '—';
  const lcEl = document.getElementById('license-class');
  if (lcEl) lcEl.textContent = LICENSES[G.license] || 'Novice';

  const moraleValEl = document.getElementById('morale-val');
  if (moraleValEl) moraleValEl.textContent = G.morale + '%';
  const moralePct = G.morale + '%';
  const moraleBar = document.getElementById('morale-bar');
  moraleBar.style.width = moralePct;
  moraleBar.className = 'bar' + (G.morale < 30 ? ' red' : G.morale < 60 ? ' amber' : '');

  const batValEl = document.getElementById('battery-val');
  if (batValEl) batValEl.textContent = G.battery + '%';
  const batPct = G.battery + '%';
  const batBar = document.getElementById('battery-bar');
  batBar.style.width = batPct;
  batBar.className = 'bar amber' + (G.battery < 30 ? ' red' : '');

  document.getElementById('qso-count').textContent = G.qsoCount;
  document.getElementById('prompt-label').textContent = `de ${G.callsign || 'W?'}>`;
  // Dynamic input mode: text keyboard for callsign/text, numeric for menu choices
  const _inp = document.getElementById('input');
  const _np  = document.getElementById('numpad');
  const _isText = G.inputMode === 'text';
  if (_inp) {
    _inp.inputMode  = _isText ? 'text' : 'numeric';
    _inp.placeholder = _isText ? 'type text here...' : 'enter number...';
    _inp.autocapitalize = _isText ? 'characters' : 'off';
  }
  if (_np) _np.style.display = _isText ? 'none' : '';
  document.getElementById('inventory-list').innerHTML = G.inventory.join('<br>');
}

function gainXP(amount) {
  G.xp += amount;
  print(`  ★ +${amount} XP earned!`, 'amber', 100);
  if (G.xp >= G.xpNext) {
    G.xp -= G.xpNext;
    G.xpNext = Math.floor(G.xpNext * 1.5);
    if (G.license < 3) {
      G.license++;
      print(``, 'system', 200);
      print(`  ══════════════════════════════════════`, 'success', 300);
      print(`  LICENSE UPGRADE! You are now: ${LICENSES[G.license]}`, 'success', 400);
      print(`  ══════════════════════════════════════`, 'success', 500);
      unlockFeatures();
    }
  }
  updateStats();
}

// ============================================================
// GAME SCENES
// ============================================================

function startIntro() {
  G.phase = 'intro';
  print('', 'system');
  print('  ██╗  ██╗ █████╗ ███╗   ███╗', 'success');
  print('  ██║  ██║██╔══██╗████╗ ████║', 'success');
  print('  ███████║███████║██╔████╔██║', 'success');
  print('  ██╔══██║██╔══██║██║╚██╔╝██║', 'success');
  print('  ██║  ██║██║  ██║██║ ╚═╝ ██║', 'success');
  print('  ╚═╝  ╚═╝╚═╝  ╚═╝╚═╝     ╚═╝  QUEST', 'success');
  printBlank();
  print('  AN AMATEUR RADIO ADVENTURE', 'amber');
  printBlank();
  print('  The year is 1985. You are a newly licensed amateur', 'white');
  print('  radio operator in a world before the internet.', 'white');
  print('  The airwaves crackle with possibility.', 'white');
  printBlank();
  print('  DX stations call from exotic lands. Emergencies need', 'white');
  print('  coordinated net control. Contests beckon with glory.', 'white');
  print('  And the eternal code of Morse waits to be mastered.', 'white');
  printBlank();
  print('  Your mission: become an Amateur Extra class operator,', 'white');
  print('  make 50 QSOs, and be the hero of Field Day.', 'white');
  printDivider();
  setTimeout(() => {
    G.phase = 'name';
    getInput('  Enter your call sign (e.g. W1AW, KD9XYZ):', (val) => {
      G.callsign = val.toUpperCase().replace(/[^A-Z0-9\/]/g, '').substring(0, 6) || 'W1HAM';
      updateStats();
      print(`  Call sign set: ${G.callsign}`, 'success');
      printBlank();
      setTimeout(mainMenu, 600);
    });
  }, 300);
}

  { id:'data_capsule', name:'Hardened Data Capsule Probe',
    type:'Probe Pod', cost:22, armor:3, probeSlots:0, dataBonus:3,
    desc:'Armored data capsule. Records and stores data even after communication loss.',
    flavor:'Signal lost at passage. You retrieve the capsule 300m away. Full data: intact.',
    note:'Internal solid-state recorder preserves data even when RF link is severed.',
    xpBonus:16, moralBonus:14 },
  { id:'dart_system', name:'Probe Dart System',
    type:'Probe Deployment', cost:40, armor:1, probeSlots:6, dataBonus:4,
    desc:'Pneumatic probe dart launcher. Fires sensor-equipped darts into tornado inflow at 150 mph.',
    flavor:'Three darts fire at 150 mph. They embed in the road surface. Data transmits immediately.',
    note:'Probe darts embed in pavement via tungsten tip. Resistant to being swept away.',
    xpBonus:24, moralBonus:20 },
  { id:'rocket_probe', name:'Rocket-Deployed Probe Pod',
    type:'Probe Deployment', cost:55, armor:1, probeSlots:6, dataBonus:4,
    desc:'Rocket-launched probe pod. Fires sensor package into the tornado core from 500m distance.',
    flavor:'The rocket fires. Two seconds later: the probe is in the tornado. Telemetry immediate.',
    note:'Rocketry allows probe placement in tornado core from safe distance. Single-use rocket motor.',
    xpBonus:26, moralBonus:22 },
  { id:'ballistic_probe', name:'Ballistic Sensor Probe',
    type:'Probe Deployment', cost:45, armor:2, probeSlots:6, dataBonus:4,
    desc:'Ballistic probe fired from cannon or pneumatic launcher. Low-drag ballistic flight path.',
    flavor:'The cannon fires. The probe arcs into the inflow region. Impact location confirmed.',
    note:'Ballistic trajectory calculated for crosswind conditions. GPS beacon confirms placement.',
    xpBonus:25, moralBonus:20 },
  { id:'dropsonde_probe', name:'DropSonde Storm Probe',
    type:'Probe Pod', cost:35, armor:1, probeSlots:5, dataBonus:4,
    desc:'Ground-launched dropsonde-style storm probe. Rises via helium then descends through storm.',
    flavor:'The balloon releases. The probe ascends to 5km. It descends through the anvil. Perfect.',
    note:'Balloon-borne probe ascent then tethered descent through storm. Full vertical profile.',
    xpBonus:22, moralBonus:20 },
  { id:'tornadic_drop', name:'Tornadic DropSonde Pod',
    type:'Probe Pod', cost:40, armor:1, probeSlots:5, dataBonus:4,
    desc:'Hardened dropsonde for direct tornadic passage. Reinforced body survives EF3 encounter.',
    flavor:'The dropsonde enters the tornado at 3000m altitude. Pressure drops 80mb in 4 seconds.',
    note:'Standard NOAA dropsonde body with EF3-rated reinforcement for direct vortex entry.',
    xpBonus:24, moralBonus:20 },
  { id:'uav_drone', name:'UAV Tornado Interceptor Drone',
    type:'Unmanned Aerial', cost:70, armor:1, probeSlots:3, dataBonus:4,
    desc:'Fixed-wing UAV for tornado intercept. Penetrates the RFD and samples the vortex wall.',
    flavor:'The UAV banks into the RFD. Turbulence spikes. It stabilises and samples the vortex.',
    note:'Fixed-wing UAV with autopilot. Can penetrate areas unsafe for ground vehicles.',
    xpBonus:30, moralBonus:26 },
  { id:'storm_pen_drone', name:'Storm Penetration Drone',
    type:'Unmanned Aerial', cost:75, armor:1, probeSlots:3, dataBonus:4,
    desc:'Reinforced storm penetration drone. Carbon-fiber fuselage, EF2-rated for direct hit.',
    flavor:'The drone flies into the wall cloud. Video feed shows the vortex base at 50 metres.',
    note:'Reinforced fuselage with Kevlar leading edges. Designed for direct cloud base penetration.',
    xpBonus:32, moralBonus:26 },
  { id:'sampling_drone', name:'Tornado Sampling Drone',
    type:'Unmanned Aerial', cost:80, armor:1, probeSlots:3, dataBonus:4,
    desc:'Atmospheric sampling drone. Collects air samples from within the vortex for chemistry.',
    flavor:'Sample collection ports open. The drone captures air from inside the tornado core.',
    note:'Air sample pods collect for post-flight chemistry analysis. Rare direct vortex chemistry data.',
    xpBonus:34, moralBonus:27 },
  { id:'quadrotor_probe', name:'Quadrotor Vortex Probe',
    type:'Unmanned Aerial', cost:65, armor:1, probeSlots:3, dataBonus:4,
    desc:'Heavy-lift quadrotor configured for tornado vortex approach. Sensor pod and camera.',
    flavor:'The quadcopter fights the inflow wind. It holds position at the vortex wall. Incredible.',
    note:'Quadrotor stability challenged by tornado inflow. Wind speeds often exceed rotor authority.',
    xpBonus:28, moralBonus:24 },
  { id:'fixedwing_drone', name:'Fixed-Wing Probe Drone',
    type:'Unmanned Aerial', cost:60, armor:1, probeSlots:3, dataBonus:4,
    desc:'Long-endurance fixed-wing drone. 2-hour flight time, large sensor payload, autopilot.',
    flavor:'Two hours aloft. The drone surveys the supercell from 3km altitude. Complete overview.',
    note:'Fixed-wing endurance allows continuous storm survey from launch to dissipation.',
    xpBonus:26, moralBonus:22 },
  { id:'aerostat', name:'Aerostat Tornado Sensor Platform',
    type:'Unmanned Aerial', cost:55, armor:0, probeSlots:4, dataBonus:3,
    desc:'Tethered aerostat balloon with sensor payload. Stable platform at 200m AGL.',
    flavor:'The aerostat holds at 200 metres. Wind profile: 180 degrees veering to 250 at altitude.',
    note:'Tethered aerostat stable in moderate winds. Limited to non-tornadic storm environment.',
    xpBonus:24, moralBonus:20 },
  { id:'balloon_probe', name:'Balloon-Borne Tornado Probe',
    type:'Probe Deployment', cost:30, armor:0, probeSlots:4, dataBonus:3,
    desc:'Free-launch weather balloon with in-situ sensors. Released in tornado inflow region.',
    flavor:'You release the balloon in the inflow. It ascends through the cloud base into the anvil.',
    note:'Free-balloon ascent through storm for complete vertical thermodynamic profile.',
    xpBonus:18, moralBonus:18 },
  { id:'lidar_truck', name:'Mobile Lidar Intercept Truck',
    type:'Mobile Lidar', cost:160, armor:1, probeSlots:0, dataBonus:6,
    desc:'Mobile lidar truck. 1.5 micron scanning lidar for wind field retrieval inside tornadoes.',
    flavor:'Lidar pulses paint the debris field in 3D. The vortex structure is visualised in real time.',
    note:'Mobile lidar retrieves wind vectors without entering the tornado. Safe but high-data.',
    xpBonus:52, moralBonus:36 },
  { id:'doppler_lidar', name:'Doppler Lidar Chase Vehicle',
    type:'Mobile Lidar', cost:170, armor:1, probeSlots:0, dataBonus:6,
    desc:'Doppler lidar chase vehicle. Measures radial wind velocity at 50m resolution within 5km.',
    flavor:'Doppler lidar resolves the vortex core at 50-metre intervals. Unprecedented resolution.',
    note:'Coherent Doppler lidar for near-field tornado wind retrieval. Better than radar near-vortex.',
    xpBonus:55, moralBonus:36 },
  { id:'radar_atv', name:'Radar Probe ATV',
    type:'All-Terrain', cost:35, armor:1, probeSlots:3, dataBonus:2,
    desc:'ATV with compact radar unit and sensor array. Off-road access to pre-positioned areas.',
    flavor:'The ATV threads through the field. You position the radar 200m from the tornado path.',
    note:'ATV mobility allows positioning in terrain inaccessible to full-size vehicles.',
    xpBonus:20, moralBonus:18 },
  { id:'intercept_buggy', name:'Intercept Buggy',
    type:'All-Terrain', cost:30, armor:1, probeSlots:2, dataBonus:2,
    desc:'Lightweight storm chaser intercept buggy. High ground clearance, rapid repositioning.',
    flavor:'The buggy ducks under the overpass and repositions in 90 seconds. Agile.',
    note:'Buggy speed and agility compensate for limited armor. Escape vehicle for intercept teams.',
    xpBonus:18, moralBonus:16 },
  { id:'probe_jeep', name:'4x4 Probe Deployment Jeep',
    type:'All-Terrain', cost:45, armor:2, probeSlots:4, dataBonus:3,
    desc:'4x4 Jeep with probe deployment capability. Off-road access and probe rack combined.',
    flavor:'The Jeep positions the probes across the gravel road. Off-road to reach optimal site.',
    note:'Standard chase Jeep upgraded with probe deployment rack and sensor boom.',
    xpBonus:24, moralBonus:20 },
  { id:'storm_tank', name:'Storm Tank Interceptor',
    type:'Armored Intercept', cost:200, armor:8, probeSlots:2, dataBonus:4,
    desc:'Custom storm intercept tank. Ex-military APC converted for extreme tornado intercept.',
    flavor:'The storm tank does not move. Category 5 thunderstorm gust front. No problem.',
    note:'Ex-military APC with tornado research instruments. Near-invulnerable to EF5 winds.',
    xpBonus:65, moralBonus:38 },
  { id:'armored_tank_concept', name:'Armored Tornado Tank Concept',
    type:'Armored Intercept', cost:260, armor:9, probeSlots:3, dataBonus:5,
    desc:'Concept armored tornado tank. Full military armor, hydraulic earth anchors, full lab.',
    flavor:'The tornado tank concept drives into the wedge. EF5. 300 mph. Data flows.',
    note:'Theoretical maximum protection intercept vehicle. Engineering study only.',
    xpBonus:80, moralBonus:45 },
  { id:'tornado_hunter', name:'Tornado Hunter Truck',
    type:'Research Vehicle', cost:75, armor:3, probeSlots:3, dataBonus:3,
    desc:'Tornado hunter custom research truck. Sensor boom, camera array, probe rack.',
    flavor:'The hunter truck charges the storm. Six cameras, eight probes, one crazy driver.',
    note:'Popular custom research truck design. Combines mobility with research capability.',
    xpBonus:32, moralBonus:26 },
  { id:'proberunner', name:'ProbeRunner Mobile Unit',
    type:'Probe Vehicle', cost:58, armor:2, probeSlots:4, dataBonus:3,
    desc:'ProbeRunner mobile unit. Rapid probe deployment vehicle with 10-probe capacity.',
    flavor:'You run the ProbeRunner at 60 mph and drop probes every 200 metres. Science.',
    note:'Speed-optimised for probe seeding over large areas during storm approach.',
    xpBonus:26, moralBonus:22 },
  { id:'cyclone_rover', name:'Cyclone Rover',
    type:'All-Terrain', cost:52, armor:2, probeSlots:3, dataBonus:3,
    desc:'Cyclone rover all-terrain storm chase vehicle. Rocky terrain access with probe rack.',
    flavor:'The Cyclone Rover handles the drainage ditch. Probe positioned exactly where needed.',
    note:'All-terrain capability with moderate probe capacity. Good balance of mobility and science.',
    xpBonus:24, moralBonus:20 },
  { id:'vortex_wagon', name:'Vortex Intercept Wagon',
    type:'Research Vehicle', cost:48, armor:2, probeSlots:3, dataBonus:3,
    desc:'Vortex intercept station wagon. Low-profile, reliable, sensor-equipped for rapid intercept.',
    flavor:'The wagon blends with traffic until the chase begins. Then it accelerates hard.',
    note:'Station wagon ground clearance works better than sedans for rural storm chasing roads.',
    xpBonus:22, moralBonus:18 },
  { id:'wind_core_pod', name:'Wind Core Probe Pod',
    type:'Probe Pod', cost:18, armor:2, probeSlots:0, dataBonus:3,
    desc:'Wind core probe pod. Vane anemometer, pressure, temp in hardened capsule.',
    flavor:'The wind core pod records 198 mph. The strongest direct measurement in your log.',
    note:'Compact probe pod with rotating cup anemometer for direct wind speed measurement.',
    xpBonus:14, moralBonus:12 },
  { id:'impact_cube', name:'Tornado Impact Probe Cube',
    type:'Probe Pod', cost:20, armor:3, probeSlots:0, dataBonus:3,
    desc:'Cubic probe with impact sensors. Measures debris impact forces during tornado passage.',
    flavor:'Ping. Ping. BANG. The accelerometer logs debris impacts at 200 mph. Data gold.',
    note:'Impact force data from debris strikes helps model tornado debris hazard loading.',
    xpBonus:15, moralBonus:13 },
  { id:'pressure_spike', name:'Pressure Spike Probe',
    type:'Probe Pod', cost:15, armor:2, probeSlots:0, dataBonus:3,
    desc:'Ultra-sensitive pressure probe. 0.1 mb resolution. Placed in tornado path for pressure trace.',
    flavor:'The pressure trace shows the mesocyclone, then the tornado core: 50 mb in 2 seconds.',
    note:'0.1 mb pressure resolution reveals tornado sub-vortex pressure perturbations.',
    xpBonus:12, moralBonus:12 },
  { id:'anchor_probe', name:'Ground Anchor Sensor Probe',
    type:'Probe Pod', cost:22, armor:4, probeSlots:0, dataBonus:3,
    desc:'Anchor-equipped sensor probe. Drives steel spikes into ground for displacement resistance.',
    flavor:'The anchor probe drives its spikes 15cm into the asphalt. EF4 cannot move it.',
    note:'Ground anchor system prevents tornado wind from displacing the probe before measurement.',
    xpBonus:16, moralBonus:14 },
  { id:'data_capsule_2', name:'Tornado Data Capsule',
    type:'Probe Pod', cost:20, armor:3, probeSlots:0, dataBonus:3,
    desc:'Hardened tornado data capsule with internal recorder. Survives direct tornado passage.',
    flavor:'The data capsule records every second of the vortex passage. Retrieved 400m away.',
    note:'Internal solid-state memory survives crush, debris impact, and submersion.',
    xpBonus:14, moralBonus:13 },
  { id:'instrument_barrel', name:'Instrumented Probe Barrel',
    type:'Probe Pod', cost:25, armor:4, probeSlots:0, dataBonus:3,
    desc:'Concrete-ballasted instrument barrel. Measures full met suite during tornado passage.',
    flavor:'The barrel barely moves. Inside: continuous 100 Hz pressure, temp, humidity recording.',
    note:'Concrete ballast plus steel shell. Almost impossible to overturn by EF4 winds.',
    xpBonus:16, moralBonus:14 },
  { id:'sensor_cylinder', name:'Hardened Sensor Cylinder',
    type:'Probe Pod', cost:22, armor:4, probeSlots:0, dataBonus:3,
    desc:'Steel sensor cylinder with armored ports. Cylindrical shape minimises wind loading.',
    flavor:'Cylindrical profile sheds debris efficiently. The cylinder rolls but does not fly.',
    note:'Cylinder geometry minimises drag coefficient. Less likely to be lofted than flat probes.',
    xpBonus:15, moralBonus:13 },
  { id:'micro_swarm', name:'Micro Probe Swarm Unit',
    type:'Swarm Technology', cost:70, armor:1, probeSlots:12, dataBonus:4,
    desc:'Micro probe swarm launcher. Deploys 20 miniaturised sensor units across tornado path.',
    flavor:'Twenty micro-probes scatter across the road. Probabilistic coverage of the vortex track.',
    note:'Swarm approach: if only 5 of 20 probes survive passage, the mission succeeds.',
    xpBonus:32, moralBonus:26 },
  { id:'swarm_drone', name:'Swarm Drone Tornado Probes',
    type:'Swarm Technology', cost:85, armor:1, probeSlots:10, dataBonus:5,
    desc:'UAV swarm system. 10 autonomous micro-drones coordinate to surround a tornado.',
    flavor:'Ten drones encircle the tornado at 100m radius. Simultaneous multi-point sampling.',
    note:'Swarm coordination via 915 MHz mesh network. Drones maintain formation in 100 mph inflow.',
    xpBonus:36, moralBonus:28 },
  { id:'auto_crawler', name:'Autonomous Probe Crawler',
    type:'Autonomous Rover', cost:75, armor:2, probeSlots:4, dataBonus:4,
    desc:'Autonomous slow-moving probe crawler. Positions itself in tornado path via GPS waypoints.',
    flavor:'The crawler receives the waypoint: 300m ahead, 2 minutes. It arrives exactly on time.',
    note:'Autonomous navigation to pre-computed tornado track intercept point. 0-5 mph deployment speed.',
    xpBonus:30, moralBonus:24 },
  { id:'probe_mule', name:'Remote Tornado Sensor Mule',
    type:'Autonomous Rover', cost:60, armor:2, probeSlots:4, dataBonus:3,
    desc:'RC electric mule for sensor transport and deployment. Long battery life, low RFI.',
    flavor:'You drive the mule to position via FPV. Drop the sensors. Drive it back out. Clean.',
    note:'Electric drive = zero ignition RFI. Critical when sensors measure electric field.',
    xpBonus:26, moralBonus:22 },
  { id:'intercept_util', name:'Intercept Utility Truck',
    type:'Research Vehicle', cost:62, armor:2, probeSlots:3, dataBonus:3,
    desc:'Intercept utility truck. Cargo bed with weather instrument rack and generator.',
    flavor:'Generator starts. All instruments power up. Ready for 8 hours of continuous operation.',
    note:'Generator gives AC power independence. No vehicle idling required for instrument power.',
    xpBonus:28, moralBonus:22 },
  { id:'storm_mapping', name:'Storm Mapping Vehicle',
    type:'Research Vehicle', cost:80, armor:1, probeSlots:3, dataBonus:4,
    desc:'Storm mapping vehicle with 360 lidar, photogrammetry, and GPS precision mapping.',
    flavor:'The mapping vehicle surveys tornado damage in real-time. 1cm resolution 3D model.',
    note:'Post-event damage mapping combines lidar, photogrammetry, and GPS for EF-scale assessment.',
    xpBonus:32, moralBonus:26 },
  { id:'mesonet_suv', name:'Mesonet Interceptor SUV',
    type:'Mobile Mesonet', cost:58, armor:1, probeSlots:3, dataBonus:3,
    desc:'SUV mobile mesonet with roof-mounted sensor boom. Drives continuously through storm.',
    flavor:'The SUV cuts across the forward flank. The boom reads: 60F dew point. Extremely unstable.',
    note:'SUV manoeuvrability ideal for rapid transect of multiple storm sectors.',
    xpBonus:26, moralBonus:22 },
  { id:'recon_truck', name:'Tornado Recon Truck',
    type:'Research Vehicle', cost:68, armor:2, probeSlots:3, dataBonus:3,
    desc:'Tornado reconnaissance truck. Long-range fuel, communications suite, full met instruments.',
    flavor:'The recon truck is positioned 50 miles ahead of the storm. You have 3 hours to set up.',
    note:'Long-range reconnaissance for storm environment assessment before intercept.',
    xpBonus:28, moralBonus:24 },
  { id:'probecat', name:'ProbeCat Tracked Vehicle',
    type:'All-Terrain', cost:90, armor:3, probeSlots:5, dataBonus:4,
    desc:'ProbeCat tracked tornado probe vehicle. Tank tracks for any terrain. Probe catapult.',
    flavor:'ProbeCat crosses the muddy field. The catapult fires a probe 150m downtrack.',
    note:'Tank tracks give absolute terrain independence. Catapult fires probes from moving vehicle.',
    xpBonus:38, moralBonus:28 },
  { id:'penetration_rover', name:'Tornado Penetration Tracked Rover',
    type:'Armored Intercept', cost:120, armor:6, probeSlots:4, dataBonus:4,
    desc:'Armored tracked rover for direct tornado penetration. Remote-operated, EF4 rated.',
    flavor:'The rover drives into the rain curtain. Visibility: zero. Instruments: all reading.',
    note:'Tracked for terrain independence. Remote operation keeps crew at safe distance.',
    xpBonus:45, moralBonus:32 },
  { id:'vortex_6x6', name:'Vortex Hunter 6x6',
    type:'All-Terrain', cost:110, armor:4, probeSlots:4, dataBonus:4,
    desc:'Six-wheel-drive Vortex Hunter. Goes anywhere in any conditions. Full research suite.',
    flavor:'Six wheels grip. You position perfectly despite the mud and hail. Flawless.',
    note:'6x6 drive gives maximum traction in saturated soils common in tornado environments.',
    xpBonus:42, moralBonus:30 },
  { id:'intercept_apc', name:'Extreme Weather Intercept APC',
    type:'Armored Intercept', cost:190, armor:7, probeSlots:3, dataBonus:4,
    desc:'APC converted for extreme weather intercept. Full armor, AC climate control, lab space.',
    flavor:'Inside the APC: air conditioned, quiet, full lab. Outside: EF4 tornado. No problem.',
    note:'Military APC conversion with full interior weather instrumentation lab.',
    xpBonus:62, moralBonus:38 },
  { id:'research_humvee', name:'Tornado Research Humvee',
    type:'Research Vehicle', cost:95, armor:4, probeSlots:3, dataBonus:3,
    desc:'HMMWV research Humvee. Military chassis, research instruments, probe rack.',
    flavor:'The Humvee fords the creek and positions on the target road. 4 minutes to intercept.',
    note:'Military HMMWV gives off-road capability with familiar service and parts availability.',
    xpBonus:38, moralBonus:28 },
  { id:'probe_humvee', name:'Probe Deployment Humvee',
    type:'Probe Vehicle', cost:100, armor:4, probeSlots:5, dataBonus:4,
    desc:'HMMWV configured for probe deployment. Armored bed with 8-probe pneumatic launcher.',
    flavor:'Eight probes fire simultaneously from the Humvee bed. Seeded. Perfect.',
    note:'Humvee probe platform combines military durability with rapid multi-probe deployment.',
    xpBonus:40, moralBonus:30 },
  { id:'armored_van', name:'Storm Chaser Armored Van',
    type:'Armored Intercept', cost:88, armor:4, probeSlots:3, dataBonus:3,
    desc:'Armored chase van. Steel plate, reinforced glass, probe rack, full comms suite.',
    flavor:'The van positions broadside to the tornado. Side-mounted probes deploy automatically.',
    note:'Van body allows all-around probe deployment, critical for non-frontal tornado approaches.',
    xpBonus:36, moralBonus:28 },
  { id:'sampling_apc', name:'Tornado Sampling APC',
    type:'Armored Intercept', cost:175, armor:7, probeSlots:4, dataBonus:4,
    desc:'APC equipped for direct atmospheric sampling in tornado core. Air intake probes.',
    flavor:'The APC drives into the tornado. Air sampling ports open. Chemistry probes fill.',
    note:'Direct air sample collection from inside tornado core. Unique chemistry dataset.',
    xpBonus:58, moralBonus:36 },
  { id:'vortex_mk3', name:'Hardened Vortex Probe Mk III',
    type:'Probe Deployment', cost:80, armor:5, probeSlots:6, dataBonus:5,
    desc:'Mk III hardened vortex probe. Carbon-nanotube armor, GPS beacon, full met suite, video.',
    flavor:'Mk III survives a confirmed EF5 direct hit. Data: complete. Video: unbelievable.',
    note:'Mk III represents the current state-of-the-art in in-situ tornado probe hardening.',
    xpBonus:36, moralBonus:28 },
  { id:'deep_core', name:'Deep Core Tornado Probe',
    type:'Probe Pod', cost:60, armor:5, probeSlots:0, dataBonus:5,
    desc:'Deep core probe. Penetrates into the tornado core at ground level for extreme data.',
    flavor:'The deep core probe records conditions at the very centre. 50mb. 300 mph. 140F.',
    note:'Designed for extreme core conditions. Thermal protection plus mechanical hardening.',
    xpBonus:28, moralBonus:24 },
  { id:'extreme_rig', name:'Extreme Intercept Research Rig',
    type:'Armored Intercept', cost:240, armor:8, probeSlots:5, dataBonus:5,
    desc:'Ultimate extreme intercept research rig. Everything in one vehicle. Armored. Probes. Radar.',
    flavor:'The extreme rig deploys everything simultaneously: radar, probes, drones, instruments.',
    note:'All-in-one extreme weather research vehicle. Radar, probes, UAV launch, lidar, lab.',
    xpBonus:78, moralBonus:42 },
  { id:'hypervortex', name:'HyperVortex Interceptor Concept',
    type:'Armored Intercept', cost:300, armor:9, probeSlots:5, dataBonus:5,
    desc:'HyperVortex concept vehicle. Theoretical EF5 intercept. Full research suite. Titanium hull.',
    flavor:'HyperVortex concept: drives directly into an EF5 wedge. All instruments. All cameras.',
    note:'Engineering concept only. Theoretical limits of tornado intercept vehicle design.',
    xpBonus:95, moralBonus:50 },

  // ══ ADDITIONAL INTERCEPT VEHICLES ═══════════════════════════════════════
  { id:'utav', name:'Urban Tornado Assault Vehicle (UTAV)',
    type:'Armored Intercept', cost:145, armor:6, probeSlots:3, dataBonus:4,
    desc:'Steve Worthington UTAV. Custom-built extreme intercept vehicle. Heavy steel armor, reinforced Ram chassis, hydraulic ground anchor system, full sensor array. Built for direct urban tornado engagement.',
    flavor:'The UTAV takes the corner at 60. Worthington knows every county road in Tornado Alley.',
    note:'Built by Steve Worthington. Designed for intercepts in urban and suburban areas where standard rigs are too wide.',
    xpBonus:52, moralBonus:34 },
  { id:'tornado_puncher', name:'Tornado Puncher',
    type:'Armored Intercept', cost:115, armor:5, probeSlots:2, dataBonus:4,
    desc:'The Tornado Puncher. Low-slung armored intercept truck. Wedge-shaped nose deflects debris, hydraulic skirt seals the undercarriage. Built for head-on vortex engagement.',
    flavor:'The Puncher drives straight into the wall cloud. The nose wedge parts the inflow like a bow wave.',
    note:'Wedge nose design tested in wind tunnel. Debris deflection angle reduces direct impact force significantly.',
    xpBonus:44, moralBonus:30 },
  { id:'dominator_fore', name:'Dominator Fore',
    type:'Armored Intercept', cost:125, armor:5, probeSlots:3, dataBonus:4,
    desc:'Dominator Fore prototype. Early Dominator programme test vehicle. Steel-plated Ford F-series chassis, early anchor system, roof camera mount. Predecessor to Dominator 1.',
    flavor:'The Fore creaks as the wind builds. Older steel, older anchors. Still holding.',
    note:'Pre-production Dominator. Tested intercept concepts later refined in Dominator 1-3. Collector vehicle.',
    xpBonus:46, moralBonus:30 },
  { id:'subativ', name:'Subativ',
    type:'Armored Intercept', cost:105, armor:4, probeSlots:3, dataBonus:3,
    desc:'Subativ armored intercept vehicle. Subaru-based AWD platform with full armor overlay. Low center of gravity, AWD traction, probe rack. Unconventional but effective.',
    flavor:'The Subativ grips the muddy field. AWD pulls through terrain that stops bigger rigs cold.',
    note:'Subaru AWD base gives traction advantage in wet fields. Lower profile than truck-based interceptors.',
    xpBonus:40, moralBonus:28 },
  { id:'dominator_ford', name:'Dominator Ford',
    type:'Armored Intercept', cost:130, armor:5, probeSlots:3, dataBonus:4,
    desc:'Dominator Ford variant. Ford-chassis Dominator build. Heavy-duty F-350 platform, full armor, ground anchors, dual probe arms. Ford diesel torque for superior low-speed maneuverability.',
    flavor:'Ford diesel grunt. You position the Dominator Ford in ankle-deep mud without hesitation.',
    note:'Ford chassis variant of Dominator programme. Diesel torque preferred for low-speed intercept positioning.',
    xpBonus:48, moralBonus:32 },
  { id:'armadillo', name:'Armadillo Interceptor',
    type:'Armored Intercept', cost:155, armor:6, probeSlots:3, dataBonus:4,
    desc:'Armadillo Interceptor. Rounded armor shell inspired by the armadillo natural defense. Curved steel panels deflect rather than absorb debris. Low flat profile, anchor outriggers, sensor suite.',
    flavor:'Debris pings off the curved Armadillo shell and flies over the roof. Perfect geometry.',
    note:'Curved armor philosophy: deflect not absorb. Rounded shell sheds debris at oblique angles reducing impact energy.',
    xpBonus:54, moralBonus:34 },
  { id:'stormpiercer', name:'Stormpiercer / DOROTHY',
    type:'Probe Deployment Rig', cost:170, armor:5, probeSlots:6, dataBonus:5,
    desc:'Stormpiercer / DOROTHY probe deployment vehicle. Launches an array of sensor-equipped DOROTHY probes across the tornado inflow path. Inspired by the original Twister DOROTHY concept but fully realised.',
    flavor:'DOROTHY probes fire from the launch rail. Seven sensors scatter across the inflow. The storm collects them.',
    note:'DOROTHY probe rail fires 7 instrumented pods simultaneously. GPS tracks each one. Data recovered post-storm.',
    xpBonus:60, moralBonus:38 },
  { id:'titus', name:'TITUS',
    type:'Armored Intercept', cost:185, armor:7, probeSlots:4, dataBonus:5,
    desc:'TITUS Tornado Intercept Truck with Ultimate Survivability. Military-grade armor plating, active suspension, full NBC-style sealed crew compartment, six-point harness, titanium skid plates. EF4 rated.',
    flavor:'TITUS locks down. Sealed crew compartment. The readouts confirm: tornado is on top of you.',
    note:'TITUS military-derived design. Sealed crew compartment prevents debris intrusion. Positive pressure system.',
    xpBonus:65, moralBonus:38 },
  { id:'tornado_wrangler', name:'Tornado Wrangler',
    type:'All-Terrain', cost:80, armor:3, probeSlots:4, dataBonus:3,
    desc:'Tornado Wrangler Jeep-based chase rig. Lifted Wrangler with full cage, probe rack, sensor boom, off-road tires. Gets to places no other intercept vehicle can reach.',
    flavor:'The Wrangler climbs the embankment. You position the boom perfectly. Nobody else can get here.',
    note:'Jeep Wrangler agility opens intercept positions on rough terrain. Limited armor but maximum mobility.',
    xpBonus:34, moralBonus:26 },
  { id:'hurricane_heist_dom', name:'Hurricane Heist Dominator',
    type:'Armored Intercept', cost:200, armor:7, probeSlots:4, dataBonus:5,
    desc:'The Hurricane Heist Dominator. Movie-grade armored vehicle converted for real storm research. Full Dominator spec plus cinematic camera rigs, Hollywood-grade instrumentation, and the most aggressive exterior in the fleet.',
    flavor:'The Hurricane Heist Dominator is a movie star that actually does the job. EF4 direct. Still rolling.',
    note:'Based on the screen hero of the 2018 film The Hurricane Heist. Converted to full working research spec. Unique.',
    xpBonus:68, moralBonus:40 },

// ── CELEBRITY CHASERS ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
];

const STORM_OUTCOMES = [
  { text:'You intercept a classic cone tornado. Probes deployed. Data: excellent.', xp:35, mo:30, bat:-15 },
  { text:'Wedge tornado. Half a mile wide. You hold position. Instruments max out.', xp:55, mo:45, bat:-25 },
  { text:'Stovepipe tornado. Textbook. Probes read 100mb pressure drop. Perfect data.', xp:40, mo:35, bat:-15 },
  { text:'Rain-wrapped tornado. You drove into it blind. Lucky escape. Partial data.', xp:20, mo:10, bat:-30 },
  { text:'Rope-out stage. You captured the final decay. Unusual thermodynamics noted.', xp:25, mo:22, bat:-10 },
  { text:'Satellite tornado forms beside the main vortex. Two intercepts for one deploy!', xp:50, mo:40, bat:-20 },
  { text:'Multi-vortex outbreak. Seven tornadoes simultaneously. Coordinated probe deployment.', xp:65, mo:50, bat:-35 },
  { text:'EF5 wedge. You survived. The data is priceless. The vehicle is... changed.', xp:90, mo:60, bat:-45 },
  { text:'Narrow miss. Tornado shifted right at the last second. Near miss. Morale: shaken.', xp:10, mo:-15, bat:-10 },
  { text:'Lightning strike nearby. All electronics temporarily offline. Data gap noted.', xp:5, mo:-10, bat:-20 },
  { text:'Highway blocked by debris. Repositioning cost time. Partial intercept only.', xp:15, mo:5, bat:-15 },
  { text:'Beautiful supercell. No tornado developed. But the mesocyclone data is valuable.', xp:18, mo:20, bat:-10 },
  { text:'Perfect intercept. Ham radio in the vehicle picks up storm spotters on 146.52.', xp:35, mo:32, bat:-12 },
  { text:'You set up near a DOW truck. Dual-Doppler synthesis achieved. Science milestone.', xp:60, mo:45, bat:-20 },
  { text:'Landspout over the dry line. Not a supercell tornado but still useful data.', xp:20, mo:18, bat:-8 },
];

function stormChaserMenu() {
  printBlank();
  printDivider();
  print('  ⚡ STORM CHASER OPERATIONS ⚡', 'header');
  printDivider();
  print('  Deploy into severe weather. Chase tornadoes. Collect data.', 'system');
  if (G.activeStormVehicle) {
    print('  Vehicle: ' + G.activeStormVehicle, 'success');
    print('  Tornado intercepts: ' + (G.tornadoCount || 0), 'amber');
    print('  Data collected: ' + (G.stormData || 0) + ' datasets', 'amber');
    const celebs = G.celebEncounters || [];
    if (celebs.length) {
      const rare = celebs.filter(e => e.rare).length;
      print('  Celebrity encounters: ' + celebs.length + (rare ? ' (' + rare + ' rare!)' : ''), 'cyan');
    }
    const ach = G.stormAchievements || {};
    const achList = [];
    if (ach.ef5) achList.push('EF5 SURVIVOR');
    if (ach.vet) achList.push('VETERAN CHASER');
    if (ach.celeb) achList.push('CELEBRITY SPOTTER');
    if (ach.all_four) achList.push('THE WHOLE GANG');
    if (ach.legendary) achList.push('★ FULL CONVOY LEGEND');
    if (achList.length) print('  Achievements: ' + achList.join(' | '), 'success');
  } else {
    print('  No storm vehicle acquired. Visit the Storm Equipment Depot.', 'danger');
  }
  printBlank();
  printChoices([
    { label: '⚡ Chase a tornado', fn: stormChase },
    { label: '⛈  Monitor severe weather (safe)', fn: stormMonitor },
    { label: '• Storm Equipment Depot', fn: stormDepot },
    { label: '• View storm intercept log', fn: viewStormLog },
    { label: 'Back to shack', fn: mainMenu },
  ]);
}

  // ── REED TIMMER ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  {

      '"This is the most violent storm I have ever been in! LOOK at that debris cascade!"',
